name: cellmlforge-workspace-manager
description: CellMLForge Workspace Manager - Desktop app for managing OMEX/COMBINE archives with git integration and GitHub push
author: CellMLForge Team

scripts.build-ts: npm run build-main && npm run typecheck-renderer
scripts.dev: npm run build-main && concurrently "npm run renderer-dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.prepare-icons:if-win: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); if (process.platform === 'win32') { execSync('npm run prepare-icons', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } else { console.log('Skipping icon preparation on non-Windows platform'); }"
scripts.dist:stop: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const cmds=process.platform==='win32' ? ['taskkill /F /T /IM \"CellMLForge Workspace Manager*.exe\"'] : ['pkill -f \"CellMLForge Workspace Manager\"']; for (const cmd of cmds) { try { execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'ignore' }); } catch {} }"
scripts.dist:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['dist/win-unpacked','dist/builder-effective-config.yaml','dist/latest.yml','dist/latest-mac.yml','dist/latest-linux.yml']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch {} }"
scripts.dist: npm run prepare-icons:if-win && npm run build-main && npm run renderer-build && electron-builder
scripts.dist:fresh: npm run dist:stop && npm run dist:clean && npm run dist
scripts.dist:dir: npm run prepare-icons:if-win && npm run build-main && npm run renderer-build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist:dir:fresh: npm run dist:stop && npm run dist:clean && npm run dist:dir
scripts.dist:quick: npm run prepare-icons:if-win && npm run build-main && npm run renderer-build && electron-builder --win portable --config.compression=store
scripts.dist:quick:fresh: npm run dist:stop && npm run dist:clean && npm run dist:quick
